title: crotalaria polysperma subsp. grantii
intro: Crotalaria polysperma subsp. grantii is a plant species known for its medicinal properties and traditional uses. It is a type of shrub or small tree that is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including wound healing, fever reduction, and the treatment of various infections. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the Crotalaria polysperma subsp. grantii plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
